keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY FLATULENCE. Flatulence : Arg-n., Arn., Asaf., Carb-v., Cham., Chin., Cocc., Grap., Ign., Kali-c., Lyc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sil., Sul. Flatulence, right : Bism., Calc-c., Grap., Lil-t., Nat-s., Ox-ac., Pho., Thu. Flatulence, left : Am-m., Aur., Carb-v., Con., Crot-t., Dios., Euphorb., Lyc., Nat-m., Pho-ac., Seneg., Stap., Sul. Flatulence, discharge of : Carb-v., Chin., Grap., Kali-c., Old. Flatulence, fermenting , as if : Rhus-t. Flatulence, foul , putrid : Ars., Asaf., Carb-v., Cocc., Pul., Squil., Sul. Flatulence, generation of : Carb-v., Kali-c., Mar-v. Flatulence, noisy , rumbling, growling, etc. : Ant-c., Carb-v., Caust., Chin., Hell., Lyc., Nat-m., Nat-s., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Flatulence, obstructed , retained : Ant-t., Aur., Carb-v., Cham., Chin., Cocc., Grap., Ign., Lyc., Nat-c., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Plb., Pul., Raph., Stap. Flatulence, obstructed, retained, left : Aur. Flatulence, painful , wind colic : Carb-v., Cham., Chin., Lyc., Nat-s., Nux-v., Pul., Rhod., Stap., Ver-a. Flatulence, pressing , on bladder : Carb-v., Ign., Kali-c. Flatulence, pressing, on rectum : Calc-c., Ign., Nat-s. Flatulence, pressing, upward : Arg-n., Carb-v., Grap., Thu. Flatulence, sour : Nat-c. Flatulence, up and down , passing, amel. : Arg-n., Grap., Kali-c., Sang., Ver-a. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
